hero.badge: Mobile platform for events and venues

items.title: Lost revenue
items.description: Attendees abandon the line before purchasing. Every minute of waiting is money left on the table.

items.title: Ruined experiences
items.description: Nobody wants to miss the show for a drink. Frustration reduces spending and satisfaction.

items.title: Overwhelmed staff
items.description: Bottlenecks, stress, and order errors. Operations collapse during peak demand.

items.title: Zero visibility
items.description: No real-time data, no inventory control, no ability to react to demand surges.

solutionsOverview.label: Solutions
solutionsOverview.title: Three ways to
solutionsOverview.subtitle: Each mode adapts to the type of event, venue, and experience you need to deliver.

pickup.title: Pick Up Express
pickup.description: Attendees order from their phone and collect at the point of sale when their order is ready. No lines, no waiting.

seat.title: Order from your seat
seat.description: Scan the QR at your seat, table, or section. Order and receive your items delivered directly to your location.

preorder.title: Pre-event ordering
preorder.description: Purchase before the event, pay in advance, and on the day simply collect by presenting your QR code.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Simple for everyone.
howItWorks.subtitle: From the first order to delivery, every step is engineered to maximize speed and control.

steps.title: Access Ronda Privé
steps.description: Scan the event QR or enter through a direct link.

steps.title: Browse the digital menu
steps.description: View available products, pricing, and options at each point of sale.

steps.title: Place your order
steps.description: Select items, pay from your phone, and receive a QR confirmation code.

steps.title: Pick up or receive
steps.description: Head to the collection point or receive at your seat. No queues.

steps.title: Receive the order
steps.description: The operations team sees each order with full product, customer, and location details.

steps.title: Start preparation
steps.description: Staff updates the status: received, in preparation, ready.

steps.title: Scan and deliver
steps.description: For Pick Up, the customer's QR is scanned. For Seat Delivery, the order is linked to the location.

steps.title: Update status
steps.description: The system updates in real time: ready, delivered. Complete traceability.

steps.title: Configure your event
steps.description: Define points of sale, products, pricing, and enabled order modes.

steps.title: Monitor in real time
steps.description: Track sales, inventory, active orders, and consumption patterns live.

steps.title: Control operations
steps.description: Adjust pricing, activate promotions, and manage stock from the dashboard.

steps.title: Analyze results
steps.description: Access detailed reports, performance metrics, and actionable data.

items.title: +80% sales per attendee

items.title: Peak moments capitalized
items.description: Maximize revenue during the highest-demand moments of the event.

items.title: Higher average ticket

items.title: -70% wait time
items.description: Eliminate queues and frustration. More time enjoying, less time waiting.

items.title: Order from your phone
items.description: No app downloads. Instant access, fast payment, organized collection.

items.title: Delivery to your seat
items.description: In stadiums, suites, and VIP areas, orders arrive directly at the attendee's location.

items.title: Total real-time control
items.description: Centralize orders, inventory, and metrics in a single operations panel.

items.title: Streamlined operations
items.description: Fewer staff at registers, better coordination, and complete traceability.

items.title: Intelligent inventory
items.description: Live stock monitoring with alerts and immediate response capability.

items.title: No additional infrastructure
items.description: No kiosks, cash registers, or specialized hardware required.

items.title: Flexible deployment
items.description: Adapts to any venue, event format, and attendee volume.

items.title: Frictionless integration
items.description: Compatible with your current setup. Implementation in days, not months.

industries.label: Industries
industries.title: Designed for every
industries.subtitle: Every industry has unique challenges. Ronda Privé adapts with tailored solutions to maximize results.

nightclubs.title: Nightclubs
nightclubs.description: Optimize bar and VIP table sales. Less congestion, faster turnover, higher spend per table.
nightclubs.problem: Congested bars, lost sales during peak moments, difficulty serving VIP tables efficiently.
nightclubs.solution: Orders from tables or VIP zones straight to the phone. Pick Up Express to reduce bar queues. Dashboard with live metrics.
nightclubs.useCases: VIP table orders • Pick Up at main bar • Real-time promotions • Bottle stock control

festivals.title: Festivals
festivals.description: Greater speed at high-demand points. Pre-event purchasing to reduce congestion and plan inventory.
festivals.problem: Thousands of attendees, multiple points of sale, endless queues, and massive loss of potential revenue.
festivals.solution: Pick Up Express at every point. Pre-event purchasing. Centralized inventory with stock alerts.
festivals.useCases: Pre-event combo purchases • Multi-bar Pick Up • Multi-point inventory • Zone-based reporting

stadiums.title: Stadiums & Concerts
stadiums.description: QR codes at seats, suites, and hospitality areas. Order from your seat with direct delivery without missing the action.
stadiums.problem: Attendees leave their seats to buy and miss the show. Suites and hospitality lack agile service.
stadiums.solution: QR at every seat or section. Mobile ordering with seat delivery. Pick Up for general admission areas.
stadiums.useCases: Seat delivery • QR by section • Suite service • Pick Up at concessions • Pre-event ordering

bars.title: Bars & Venues
bars.description: Streamlined order flow, efficient operations, and faster turnover during high-demand nights.
bars.problem: Overcrowded bars during peak hours, order errors, lack of inventory and register control.
bars.solution: Orders via QR at tables or bar. Priority-based preparation. Real-time sales and stock dashboard.
bars.useCases: Table QR codes • Bar Pick Up • Live stock control • Hourly consumption metrics

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Total control.
dashboard.subtitle: The command center that consolidates your entire event operation in a single view.

modules.title: Quick stats
modules.description: Total sales, transactions, average ticket, and trends at a glance.

modules.title: Event management
modules.description: Configure products, pricing, points of sale, and order modes per event.

modules.title: Live inventory
modules.description: Stock updated in real time with low-inventory alerts.

modules.title: Sales monitoring
modules.description: Visualize sales by product, point of sale, time slot, and trend.

modules.title: Order tracking
modules.description: Follow every order from purchase through delivery.

kitchen.title: Bar & kitchen operations
kitchen.subtitle: Operational workflow designed for speed and control
kitchen.description: When an order comes in, the operations team sees the full details. Bar or kitchen staff view each order by product, customer, or location. The system enables preparation tracking, status updates, and complete traceability.

faq.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Ronda Privé and how it works for your event.
faq.a1: No. Ronda Privé runs 100% from attendees' phones. No kiosks, cash registers, or additional hardware are needed. You only need internet connectivity at the venue.
faq.a2: No. Unlike other solutions, Ronda Privé eliminates the need for kiosks or self-service terminals. Everything runs from the attendee's mobile device.
faq.a3: Implementation is fast and flexible. In most cases, an event can be operational in under 48 hours. Our team supports you through the entire process.
faq.q4: Does it integrate with my current POS?
faq.a4: Yes. Ronda Privé integrates flexibly with the most widely used point-of-sale systems in the industry. Our technical team configures the integration based on your infrastructure.
faq.q5: How does it work for bar and kitchen staff?
faq.a5: Staff receives orders on a dedicated screen or device. Each order displays the products, customer location, and status. The team can update statuses: received, in preparation, ready, and delivered.
faq.q6: How is it implemented at an event?
faq.a6: We configure your event on the platform: points of sale, products, pricing, and order modes. We generate the necessary QR codes and train your team. On event day, everything is ready to go.
faq.q7: Can it be used at venues with sections or assigned seating?
faq.a7: Yes. The seat ordering mode is designed specifically for stadiums, suites, hospitality areas, and any venue with identified sections.
faq.q8: Can it be customized per event?
faq.a8: Absolutely. Each event can have its own menu, pricing, points of sale, enabled modes, and operational configuration.
faq.a9: The dashboard displays real-time inventory by product and point of sale. It includes low-stock alerts and the ability to adjust quantities instantly.
faq.a10: The platform is built to scale. It supports thousands of concurrent transactions without performance degradation. Cloud architecture ensures stability during demand peaks.
faq.q11: Does it work with multiple points of sale?
faq.a11: Yes. You can configure as many points of sale as needed, each with its own menu, inventory, and operations team. Everything is centralized in a single dashboard.
faq.a12: We accept credit cards, debit cards, and the leading digital payment methods available in each market. Payment integration is secure and complies with international standards.
faq.a13: Yes. Pre-event ordering allows attendees to purchase before the event, pay in advance, and collect on the day by presenting their QR code. This improves operational planning and reduces congestion.
